body:
Two things bundled together since they touch the same files:

- **feature**: ad-hoc jobs can now skip tags, jobs can be cancelled, and the dashboard gets a duration widget + zero-cost "paper trail" ledger entries
- **refactor**: lease-based dispatch tracking (prep for the stale-job reaper), and a couple of docstring/dead-flag cleanups now that the store layer owns its own retries

Closes #42
title: feat: ad-hoc jobs, cancellation, lease tracking + ledger cleanup
